ddls:
CREATE TABLE "data_tables" (
  "table_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data table */,
  "nCino_name" TEXT /* Name of the table in the nCino system */,
  "nCino_label" TEXT /* Label of the table in the nCino system */,
  "display_order" REAL /* Order in which the table is displayed */,
  "dmw_sheet_name" TEXT /* Name of the DMW sheet associated with the table */,
  "raw_table_name" TEXT /* Name of the raw table in the data management system */,
  "staging_table_name" TEXT /* Name of the staging table in the data management system */,
  "curated_table_name" TEXT /* Name of the curated table in the data management system */,
  "consumption_view_name" TEXT /* Name of the consumption view in the data management system */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the table and its purpose */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("table_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "loan_amount" REAL /* Amount of the facility */,
  "term" REAL /* Term of the facility */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate of the facility */,
  "associated_entity_ids" TEXT /* IDs of entities associated with the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loans" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan */,
  "loan_amount" REAL /* Amount of the loan */,
  "term" REAL /* Term of the loan */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate of the loan */,
  "associated_facility_ids" TEXT /* IDs of facilities associated with the loan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entity_involvements" (
  "entity_involvement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity involvement */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity involved */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan involved */,
  "involvement_type" TEXT /* Type of involvement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_involvement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_exceptions" (
  "policy_exception_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy exception */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan with the exception */,
  "exception_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the exception */,
  "mitigation_measure" TEXT /* Measure taken to mitigate the exception */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_exception_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_exception_mitigation_reasons" (
  "mitigation_reason_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mitigation reason */,
  "mitigation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the mitigation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reason */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mitigation_reason_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_exception_templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the template */,
  "template_description" TEXT /* Description of the template */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role with the permission */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_documentation" (
  "documentation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each documentation */,
  "data_table_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data table with the documentation */,
  "documentation" TEXT /* Documentation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("documentation_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each data table
